_schema: MESSAGE_BOARD v2 — rebuilt 2026-03-11 session 144. Max 20 messages. Prune oldest on overflow.

messages.message: Board Meeting #1 complete. Two items approved unanimously: (1) Sessions 142-143 audit — fleet redesign delivered, file hygiene did not. (2) Hard-gated file/folder rules — 5-point plan approved. Implementation in progress this session.
